harness.type: MLCChat (patched) + adb shell input + logcat -s triad_bench:I
harness.patch_summary: Log.i('triad_bench', JSON) after each generation completes
harness.prompt: Tell me a short story about a curiosity-driven robot exploring an ancient city.
harness.note_on_cooldown: H5 requires 60s. Used 15s here to fit autonomous-session budget; expect ~1-3 tok/s decode-mean drift due to thermal. Re-run with cooldown=60 for any number that gates an acceptance.

results.label: TRIAD-INT4 (single-shot, fresh launch, validation that patch works)

summary.interpretation: TRIAD-INT4 is on-par or slightly faster than the community q4f16_1 reference for decode, with much tighter run-to-run stdev (0.56 vs 4.61). Reference run had one thermal-throttled iteration (28.3 tok/s); TRIAD did not. With the proper 60s cooldown both should land within their respective stdev bands.
